name: 5.4.2.H - Search Inventory & Checkout Flow (3 sub pages)
text_content:

Page 02: Results Page: Property cards displaying a thumbnail, square footage, CAD badge, price, and a Select & Checkout button.

Page 03: Tab Checkout Wizard:
Tab 1 – Account Info: Same As Account toggle, POC fields, NMI consent
Tab 2 – Order Info: Address validation, Relationship to Property dropdown, Quote Me For dropdown
Tab 3 – Final Steps: Co-listing Agent toggle & fields, Referral Source, Comments
Tab 4 – Terms: Cancellation policy, no AMEX note, 3% processing fee, consent checkboxes, Submit Order button, and validation errors

list.name: Floor Plan Visuals Mobile App Design

name: 5.4.2.B - Marketable Plan Residential & Wizard (11-Step Flow)
text_content:
Full 11-step order form. 

Step 1: Contact Info — Name, phone, email, and brokerage.

Step 2: Property Address — Google Places API autocomplete with street, city, state, and ZIP fields.

Step 3: Level & Structure — Story count, basement (Y/N — finished/unfinished), attic (Y/N), and detached structures.

Step 4: Matterport Details — Include toggle, interior + exterior capture, dollhouse view, measurement tool, and 3-month hosting.

Step 5: Compass Orientation — True North vs. Front Door.

Steps 6–9: Reserved custom spec slots.

Step 10: Credit Checkout — Cardholder name, PAN, MM/YY, CVV, and NMI terms acceptance.

Step 11: Success Confirmation — Order number, email receipt notification, and link to Active Order.
description:
Full 11-step order form. 

Step 1: Contact Info — Name, phone, email, and brokerage.

Step 2: Property Address — Google Places API autocomplete with street, city, state, and ZIP fields.

Step 3: Level & Structure — Story count, basement (Y/N — finished/unfinished), attic (Y/N), and detached structures.

Step 4: Matterport Details — Include toggle, interior + exterior capture, dollhouse view, measurement tool, and 3-month hosting.

Step 5: Compass Orientation — True North vs. Front Door.

Steps 6–9: Reserved custom spec slots.

Step 10: Credit Checkout — Cardholder name, PAN, MM/YY, CVV, and NMI terms acceptance.

Step 11: Success Confirmation — Order number, email receipt notification, and link to Active Order.

list.name: Floor Plan Visuals Mobile App Design

name: 4.1 - Wordmark & Emblem Rework
text_content:
Refinement and modernization of the existing wordmark and emblem to achieve a cleaner, more contemporary, and stronger visual identity. The current approach focuses on improving the overall visual quality through typography refinement, balanced proportions, and better brand presence rather than conducting a deep full-scale branding process.

An existing emblem concept has previously been developed and may provide a stronger and more recognizable direction for app-related usage. Integrating and refining the emblem for mobile app environments, alongside improvements to the current wordmark, could help establish a more cohesive and scalable brand presence across the product ecosystem.
description:
Refinement and modernization of the existing wordmark and emblem to achieve a cleaner, more contemporary, and stronger visual identity. The current approach focuses on improving the overall visual quality through typography refinement, balanced proportions, and better brand presence rather than conducting a deep full-scale branding process.

An existing emblem concept has previously been developed and may provide a stronger and more recognizable direction for app-related usage. Integrating and refining the emblem for mobile app environments, alongside improvements to the current wordmark, could help establish a more cohesive and scalable brand presence across the product ecosystem.

list.name: Floor Plan Visuals Mobile App Design

name: 4.2 - App Icon Design
text_content: Adaptation and refinement of the existing FPV emblem into a mobile app icon format. This task includes creating a simple, clean, and visually strong app icon aligned with the current FPV brand identity. If necessary, the process may include limited visual explorations and iterative refinements to evaluate different app icon directions. However, the current goal is to achieve a simple but polished and effective app icon solution rather than conducting a large-scale icon exploration process.
description: Adaptation and refinement of the existing FPV emblem into a mobile app icon format. This task includes creating a simple, clean, and visually strong app icon aligned with the current FPV brand identity. If necessary, the process may include limited visual explorations and iterative refinements to evaluate different app icon directions. However, the current goal is to achieve a simple but polished and effective app icon solution rather than conducting a large-scale icon exploration process.

name: 3.1 - Iterative UX Audit, Improvements & Solutions (Screen-Level)
text_content: Ongoing UX analysis, usability improvements, and interaction refinements performed throughout the design process on a screen-by-screen basis. This task includes identifying UX opportunities during UI production, exploring better interface behaviors, refining user flows, and applying practical UX solutions iteratively as the product design evolves.

Apply the new design approach to one or more additional pages to evaluate its results and refine design decisions as needed before beginning the full app design process.

list.name: Floor Plan Visuals Mobile App Design

name: 5.7 Search Inventory & Checkout Flow (3 sub pages)
text_content:
Page 01: Search Box Console: Address/Property ID field with State, City, Zip, Sq Ft, and CAD-available filters.

Page 02: Results Page: Property cards displaying a thumbnail, square footage, CAD badge, price, and a Select & Checkout button.

Page 03: Tab Checkout Wizard:
Tab 1 – Account Info: Same As Account toggle, POC fields, NMI consent
Tab 2 – Order Info: Address validation, Relationship to Property dropdown, Quote Me For dropdown
Tab 3 – Final Steps: Co-listing Agent toggle & fields, Referral Source, Comments
Tab 4 – Terms: Cancellation policy, no AMEX note, 3% processing fee, consent checkboxes, Submit Order button, and validation errors
description:
Page 01: Search Box Console: Address/Property ID field with State, City, Zip, Sq Ft, and CAD-available filters.

Page 02: Results Page: Property cards displaying a thumbnail, square footage, CAD badge, price, and a Select & Checkout button.

Page 03: Tab Checkout Wizard:
Tab 1 – Account Info: Same As Account toggle, POC fields, NMI consent
Tab 2 – Order Info: Address validation, Relationship to Property dropdown, Quote Me For dropdown
Tab 3 – Final Steps: Co-listing Agent toggle & fields, Referral Source, Comments
Tab 4 – Terms: Cancellation policy, no AMEX note, 3% processing fee, consent checkboxes, Submit Order button, and validation errors

list.name: Floor Plan Visuals Mobile App Design

name: 5.1 Marketable Plan Residential Wizard (11-Step Flow)
text_content:
Full 11-step order form. 

Step 1: Contact Info — Name, phone, email, and brokerage.

Step 2: Property Address — Google Places API autocomplete with street, city, state, and ZIP fields.

Step 3: Level & Structure — Story count, basement (Y/N — finished/unfinished), attic (Y/N), and detached structures.

Step 4: Matterport Details — Include toggle, interior + exterior capture, dollhouse view, measurement tool, and 3-month hosting.

Step 5: Compass Orientation — True North vs. Front Door.

Steps 6–9: Reserved custom spec slots.

Step 10: Credit Checkout — Cardholder name, PAN, MM/YY, CVV, and NMI terms acceptance.

Step 11: Success Confirmation — Order number, email receipt notification, and link to Active Order.
description:
Full 11-step order form. 

Step 1: Contact Info — Name, phone, email, and brokerage.

Step 2: Property Address — Google Places API autocomplete with street, city, state, and ZIP fields.

Step 3: Level & Structure — Story count, basement (Y/N — finished/unfinished), attic (Y/N), and detached structures.

Step 4: Matterport Details — Include toggle, interior + exterior capture, dollhouse view, measurement tool, and 3-month hosting.

Step 5: Compass Orientation — True North vs. Front Door.

Steps 6–9: Reserved custom spec slots.

Step 10: Credit Checkout — Cardholder name, PAN, MM/YY, CVV, and NMI terms acceptance.

Step 11: Success Confirmation — Order number, email receipt notification, and link to Active Order.
